Localization.Description: Exploitation of vulnerability CVE-2020-1472 (Zerologon) that allows you to change passwords to domain controller accounts

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: Exploitation of vulnerability CVE-2020-1472 (Zerologon). The password for account {object.account.name} of domain controller {event_src.host} was changed.
Exploitation of vulnerability CVE-2020-1472 (Zerologon). The password for an account of domain controller {event_src.host} was changed.
